case_title: BABAKAN, AZAR vs. AROONI, MAKID et al

docket_entries.description: OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-04-1998, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAR-04-1998, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT OSC AND SANCTION TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY KENNETH B TISHGART, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-19-1998 CONTINUED FROM MAR-04-1998 TO APR-29-1998 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BABAKAN, AZAR AS TO DEFENDANT AROONI, MAKID DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-24-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-25-1997 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-06-1997

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-24-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO PAY SANCTIONS IF NOT PAID BY 10-15-97. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY KENNETH B TISHGART. HEARING SET FOR DEC-03-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-08-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY KENNETH B TISHGART. HEARING SET FOR AUG-26-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-29-1998, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON APR-29-1998, OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFT. TO PAY ALL SANCTIONS IMPOSED STATUS STATEMENT DUE 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING OSC AND SANCTIONS TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY KENNETH B TISHGART, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-13-1998 CONTINUED FROM APR-29-1998 TO MAY-27-1998 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-27-1998, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $500.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAY-27-1998, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFT. OSC AND SANCTIONS TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY KENNETH B TISHGART WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE A STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-10-1998 CONTINUED FROM MAY-27-1998 TO JUL-08-1998 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR SEP-30-1997 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT X1
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF BABAKAN, AZAR

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-26-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE DISMISSAL OR POS OBTAIN ANSWER AND OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY KENNETH B TISHGART HEARING SET FOR OCT-14-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-03-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE OSC AS TO WHY SANCTIONS SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE, PROOF OF PUBLICATION AND TO HAVE AN ANSWER ON FILE OR DEFAULT ENTERED. OSC AND SANCTION ON PLTF'S ATTY WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE A NEW STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT 20 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-18-1997 CONTINUED FROM DEC-03-1997 TO MAR-04-1998 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH SIDE TO BEAR ITS OWN COSTS

PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-30-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT HEARING ON SEP-30-1997, SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY KENNETH B TISHGART., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-15-1997 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
